AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Planning a gathering? Reach for Alannah's Dip Mediterranean Classic Pine Nut Hommus. Its velvety smooth texture makes it a delightful choice. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
At the heart of our hummus is family.


Alannah’s Dips were born in our kitchen, inspired by the laughter, chaos, and connection that come with raising a family. Named after our daughter, this dip is a celebration of togetherness—of those joyful, messy, meaningful moments shared over food.


Our Mediterranean Classic Hommus with Pine Nut and Olive Oil is inspired by the rich culinary traditions of the eastern Mediterranean. It’s everything real hommus should be—velvety smooth, with tahini nuttiness and a subtle, savoury depth. Garnished with golden pine nuts, chickpeas and a dash of paprika, it’s made to be shared and sure to impress.


We believe the best food comes from real ingredients. That’s why every tub of Alannah’s is made with premium, wholesome ingredients.


And because we care deeply about the planet we’re leaving for our kids, our packaging is made from responsibly sourced paper—to help reduce plastic waste and tread a little lighter on the earth.


Welcome to our table.
